steps.title: Recognize what -3 represents in the function
steps.content: The function $t(x) = -3x + 74$ is in slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$. The value $-3$ is the slope, the coefficient of $x$.

steps.title: Interpret the slope as the rate of change
steps.content: In a linear function, the slope represents the rate of change. A slope of $-3$ means the estimated temperature decreases by 3 degrees Fahrenheit each hour. That matches The estimated temperature decreases 3 degrees Fahrenheit each hour., so A is correct.
